step_rationale: CAD risk via lipid and metabolic regulation; transcriptional regulator of vascular smooth-muscle and metabolic pathways.
mechanism: ZEB2 regulates lipid handling and vascular metabolic pathways, modulating atherosclerotic-plaque lipid retention and inflammation.

references.title: Multiple independent mechanisms link gene polymorphisms in the region of ZEB2 with risk of coronary artery disease.
